events.title: SHOWMAN
events.event_description:
Nyashinski is thrilled to announce SHOWMAN, a groundbreaking showcase set to take place in April 2026 in Nairobi. The production builds on the success of his previous concert, SHIN CITY, and elevates it into a first-of-its-kind residency format in Kenya.

Designed as a theatrical residency, SHOWMAN will treat both longtime fans and new audiences to a dynamic series of seven meticulously curated performances across five days within a two-week period. The lineup includes a special VIP mid-week show, giving fans the
flexibility to select a date that best suits their schedule.

Showman is set for:
Sat 4th April, 2026 - 1 Show
Sun 5th April, 2026 - 2 Shows
Wed 8th April, 2026 - 1 (Birthday) Show
Sat 11th April, 2026 - 1 Show
Sun 12th April, 2026 - 1 Show

Each performance will host a limited number of attendees to ensure an intimate, high-quality experience for all.

“SHOWMAN is more than just a concert. it is a full theatrical spectacle that brings the worlds of music and theatre crashing together. SHOWMAN features seven showings, running from April 4th to 12th, 2025. Laugh, dance, sing, marvel and make memories!”
